LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MULTICELL IMMUNOTHERAPEUTICS, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 11, 2018 TO GIVE PETITIONER AN OPPORTUNITY TO SHOW THAT IT IS IN GOOD STANDING IN DELAWARE AND IT IS NOT BARRED BY CALIFORNIA LAW FROM OBTAINING CONFIRMATION OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD DUE TO ITS STATUS WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. PETITIONER MAY FILE FURTHER SUPPLEMENTAL PAPERS LIMITED TO THESE ISSUES NO LATER THAN AUGUST 27, 2018 AND RESPONDENTS MAY FILE FURTHER SUPPLEMENTAL PAPERS LIMITED TO THESE ISSUES NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 4, 2018. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

PETITIONER MULTICELL IMMUNOTHERAPEUTICS, INC.'S MOTION ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION TO CONFIRM AWARD.

There being no appearance, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

Off-calendar, Matter settled.

Judge: Anne-Cristine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)

Notice Of Motion On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Sep-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner Multicell Immunotherapeutics, Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is continued to September 11, 2018 to give petitioner an opportunity to show that it is in good standing in Delaware and it is not barred by California law from obtaining confirmation of the arbitration award due to its status with the California Secretary of State. Petitioner may file further supplemental papers limited to these issues no later than August 27, 2018 and respondents may file further supplemental papers limited to these issues no later than September 4, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-29-2018 Continued To Jun-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Brian A. Barnhorst appearing for the petitioner;
Atty. Amy l. Rudd & Atty. Eric A. Ortiz of DLA Piper, tel. No. 1-512-457-7220
appearing for the Respondent.

RULING - Petitioner Multicell Immunotherapeutics, Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is continued to June 26, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 on the limited issue whether Petitioner has a right to seek a judgment. Supplemental Opposition to be filed and served by June 5, 2018. Supplemental Reply to be filed and served by June 19, 2018 and can include new evidence to rebut the assertion that petitioner is not legally permitted to seek a judgent. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
